Operation 'getModel' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original summary is generic and doesn't convey the specific value of retrieving model definitions. Description lacks critical details about what the 'table' parameter represents in CollectiveAccess context, what specific metadata is returned, and the practical use case for AI agents. Enhanced version clarifies the domain-specific terminology (CollectiveAccess tables), explains the parameter's purpose with examples, specifies return content, and provides context for when an AI agent should use this operation.

data.current_summary: Get model information for a table
data.current_description: Returns metadata about the table structure, fields, and relationships.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve table model metadata and field definitions
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the data model definition for a specified CollectiveAccess table, including field names, types, relationships, and structural metadata. The 'table' parameter specifies which CollectiveAccess model to retrieve (e.g., 'ca_objects', 'ca_entities'). Returns a complete model definition object containing field configurations and relationship information. Useful for understanding available fields and data structure before querying or updating items.
data.reasoning: Original summary is generic and doesn't convey the specific value of retrieving model definitions. Description lacks critical details about what the 'table' parameter represents in CollectiveAccess context, what specific metadata is returned, and the practical use case for AI agents. Enhanced version clarifies the domain-specific terminology (CollectiveAccess tables), explains the parameter's purpose with examples, specifies return content, and provides context for when an AI agent should use this operation.

message: Operation 'findItems' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description lacks detail about search capabilities, return format, and available parameters. Added context about full-text search, relevance scoring, filtering/sorting/pagination support, and permission requirements to help AI agents understand search behavior and capabilities.

data.current_description: Search for items in a given table using a query string.
data.description_suggestion: Search for records in the specified table using a query string. Supports full-text search across indexed fields. Returns matching records with relevance scoring. Accepts optional parameters for filtering, sorting, and pagination. Requires appropriate read permissions for the specified table.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks detail about search capabilities, return format, and available parameters. Added context about full-text search, relevance scoring, filtering/sorting/pagination support, and permission requirements to help AI agents understand search behavior and capabilities.

message: Operation 'updateItem' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is minimal and lacks critical details. Enhanced version specifies that it accepts ItemUpdateRequest, supports partial updates, returns the updated record, requires authentication/permissions, and mentions side effects like workflows. This enables AI agents to understand update behavior and consequences.

data.description_suggestion: Update an existing record in the specified table by ID. Accepts ItemUpdateRequest with fields to modify. Supports partial updates - only provided fields are modified. Returns the updated record with all current metadata. Requires write permissions and authentication. Triggers any configured update workflows or notifications.
data.reasoning: Original description is minimal and lacks critical details. message: Operation 'deleteItem' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is too minimal. Enhanced version clarifies that deletion is permanent and irreversible, specifies authentication/permission requirements, explains return value, and documents potential side effects like cascading deletes and audit logging. Critical for AI agents to understand the destructive nature of this operation.

data.description_suggestion: Permanently delete a record from the specified table by ID. This action is irreversible. Requires write permissions and authentication. Returns confirmation of deletion. May cascade delete related records or media depending on table configuration. Triggers any configured deletion workflows or audit logging.
data.reasoning: Original description is too minimal. data.summary_suggestion: Create a new record in table

message: Operation 'browseItems' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is clear and actionable. Description mentions faceting but lacks detail about pagination, sorting, return format, and use cases. Enhanced version clarifies hierarchical navigation, facet counts, pagination support, and typical use cases for discovery, helping AI agents understand when to use browse vs. search.

data.current_description: Browse records in the specified table with optional faceting.
data.description_suggestion: Browse records in the specified table with hierarchical navigation and optional faceted filtering. Supports sorting, pagination, and facet-based filtering to narrow results. Returns paginated record list with facet counts for available filter values. Useful for exploratory browsing and discovery workflows. Requires read permissions for the specified table.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and actionable. Description mentions faceting but lacks detail about pagination, sorting, return format, and use cases. Enhanced version clarifies hierarchical navigation, facet counts, pagination support, and typical use cases for discovery, helping AI agents understand when to use browse vs. search.

message: Operation 'getItemMedia' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is clear. Description is too minimal and lacks context about what representations are, what metadata is returned, and permission requirements. Enhanced version explains representations are derivatives, specifies returned metadata, and clarifies permission model. Helps AI agents understand media structure in CollectiveAccess.

data.current_summary: Get media representations for an item
data.current_description: Get media representations for an item
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve all media representations (derivatives) for a specific item record, such as thumbnails, preview images, or full-resolution files. Returns metadata about each representation including file type, dimensions, URLs, and access information. Representations are generated versions of uploaded media files. Requires read permissions for the item and its media.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear. Description is too minimal and lacks context about what representations are, what metadata is returned, and permission requirements. Enhanced version explains representations are derivatives, specifies returned metadata, and clarifies permission model. Helps AI agents understand media structure in CollectiveAccess.
